description: Add cross-app integration features: universal notification center, deep linking service, shared media picker, cross-app search aggregator, and activity feed across apps. These live in the packages/ directory as shared infrastructure.
steps: Create packages/notifications/src/universal-notification-center.ts - UniversalNotificationCenter class that aggregates notifications from all apps. Methods: getAll(userId, filters), markRead(ids), markAllRead(appId), getUnreadCounts(), subscribe(callback), setPreferences(userId, prefs). Group by app, support priority levels, batch digest

Create packages/common/src/deep-linking.ts - DeepLinkingService with generateLink(app, route, params), parseLink(url), registerHandler(pattern, handler), navigate(link). Support universal links across all 19 apps. Pattern: quant://appname/path?params

Create packages/media/src/shared-media-picker.ts - SharedMediaPickerService with pickImage(options), pickVideo(options), pickDocument(options), getRecent(limit), getFromApp(appName). Unified media access across apps with permission model

Create packages/search/src/cross-app-search.ts - CrossAppSearchService with search(query, apps?, filters?), getSuggestions(partial), getRecentSearches(), indexDocument(app, doc). Federated search across all apps with relevance ranking

Create packages/common/src/activity-feed.ts - ActivityFeedService with getActivities(userId, options), publishActivity(activity), getTimeline(userId), subscribe(userId, callback). Cross-app activity stream (e.g., 'John shared a video on QuantUbe', 'Alice posted on QuantSync')
Create vitest tests for each new service
Ensure new services are exported from their respective package index.ts files
acceptance_criteria: 5 new cross-app services with proper TypeScript interfaces
Services exported from package barrel files (index.ts)
All files pass strict TypeScript compilation
